catalogData.name: Change
properties: Physical, Acid, Cold, Electricity, and Fire Resistance
Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Adaptable
powers.raw: Adaptable (Trait): Spirit gains Athletics, Perception, or Stealth skill
powers.text: Spirit gains Athletics, Perception, or Stealth skill

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Chaotic World or Fleet Feet at Force
powers.text: Cast Chaotic World or Fleet Feet at Force

powers.name: Regress
powers.raw: Regress (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Stupefy or Weaken at Force. Range is 30m, but must sustain.
powers.text: Cast Stupefy or Weaken at Force. Range is 30m, but must sustain.

powers.name: Shapechange
powers.raw: Shapechange (Complex Action, Sustained 1 hour): You and spirit meld into any animal form. Use spirit's stats, but can't use attacks/powers. Resist: WIL+INT
powers.text: You and spirit meld into any animal form. Use spirit's stats, but can't use attacks/powers. Resist: WIL+INT

powers.name: Weather Control
powers.raw: Weather Control (Special, Sustained): Change weather in local area

greatFormPowers.name: Fate's Favor
greatFormPowers.raw: Fate's Favor (Trait): Gain 4 Edge instead of 1
